objective: Strategie de Momentum / Trend-following sur 0GUSDC 1M. Indicateurs : EMA(20), SMA(50), ATR. Entree long lorsque EMA(20) croise au-dessus de SMA(50), sortie sur retournement ou stop serre. Stop-loss = 1.0x ATR, take-profit = 2.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining the EMA(20) and SMA(50) moving averages with ATR-based risk management can provide a reliable trading strategy for momentum and trend following.
